announce_message_default: {e_gift} Special Offer for You! We're giving away a free {tier} plan for {days} days. Click the button below to claim your trial — limited time only!
claim_already_used: {e_success} You already claimed this promotion. Your {tier} plan is active until {expires}.
claim_full: {e_cancel} All slots for this promotion have been taken.
claim_not_eligible: {e_info} This offer is for users on the Free plan.
claim_not_found: {e_cancel} This promo link is no longer valid.
claim_not_found_toast: ❌ This promo link is no longer valid.
claim_preview_body: You're about to activate: {e_effects} {tier} plan for {days} days {e_calendar} Expires: {expires} This offer can only be claimed once.
claim_success_default: {e_party} Congratulations, %firstname%! Your {plan} plan is now active for {days} days. {e_calendar} Expires: {expires} Enjoy your premium features!
created_msg: {e_success} Campaign {code} created successfully! Share the deeplink or send it as an announcement to your users.
deeplink_text: {e_link} Shareable Deeplink Share this link anywhere — users who tap it will be brought directly to the claim screen: {url} This link works while the campaign is active.
delete_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to delete campaign {code}? This cannot be undone. Existing claims will remain in history.
wizard_code_taken: {e_warning} Code {code} is already in use. Enter a different code:
wizard_date_past: {e_warning} The expiry date must be in the future. Try again or send skip:
wizard_invalid_code: {e_warning} Code must be 2–30 characters and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens. Try again:
wizard_invalid_date: {e_warning} Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD or send skip:
wizard_preview_body: Code: {code} Plan: {tier} Duration: {days} days Audience: {audience} Max Claims: {max_claims} Campaign Expires: {expires} Show on Welcome: {welcome} Button Label: {btn_text} Button Style: {btn_style} Custom Message: {message}
wizard_step_audience: {e_success} Code: {code} → {tier} · {days} days Step 4/8 — Who can claim this promo?
wizard_step_btn_text: Step 8a/8 — Enter the button label users will see. Example: {e_gift} Claim Free Trial Send skip for the default label.
wizard_step_code: {e_gift} New Promo Campaign Step 1/8 — Enter a unique promo code. This is what appears in the deeplink. Example: LAUNCH2025, SUMMER7, TRIAL Codes are case-insensitive and stored uppercase.
wizard_step_days: {e_success} Code: {code} → Plan: {tier} Step 3/8 — How many days should the plan last? Type a number, e.g. 1, 3, 7, 14, 30
wizard_step_expires: {e_success} Code: {code} → {tier} · {days} days Step 6/8 — When does this campaign expire? Type a date (YYYY-MM-DD) or send skip for no expiry
wizard_step_max: {e_success} Code: {code} → {tier} · {days} days Step 5/8 — Maximum number of claims? Type 0 for unlimited, or a number like 100
wizard_step_message: {e_success} Code: {code} → {tier} · {days} days Step 7/8 — Custom message shown when a user claims. Supports macros: %firstname%, %plan%, %days%, %expires% Send skip to use the default message.
